docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-13-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-13-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
